de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Interface Visitor

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    ContainsAssignmentCondition.ContainsAssignment, CreatingASTVisitor, DeclarationProgramVariableCollector, FieldReplaceVisitor, FinishSymbolicExecutionUntilJoinPointMacro.FilterSymbexStrategy.FindBreakVisitor, ForToWhileTransformation, JavaASTVisitor, JoinRuleUtils.CollectLocationVariablesVisitor, JoinRuleUtils.CollectLocationVariablesVisitorHashSet, LabelCollector, MiscTools.ReadPVCollector, MiscTools.WrittenPVCollector, OuterBreakContinueAndReturnCollector, OuterBreakContinueAndReturnReplacer, ProgramElementReplacer, ProgramReplaceVisitor, ProgramVariableCollector, ProgVarReplaceVisitor, ReplaceWhileLoop, SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder.MethodFrameCounterJavaASTVisitor, SymbolicExecutionUtil.ContainsStatementVisitor, UndeclaredProgramVariableCollector, WhileInvariantTransformation, WhileLoopTransformation

    public interface Visitor
    This class is implemented by visitors/walkers. Each AST node implements a visit(Visitor) method that calls the doActionAt method. Similar to the pretty print mechanism.

    • Method Summary
